Member.Name: strSave1Prefix
Member.Description: The prefix for all images being saved

Member.Name: strSave2Prefix
Member.Description: The prefix for all images being saved

Member.Name: strSaveLastPrefix
Member.Description: The prefix for all images being saved

Member.Name: strSavePath1
Member.Description: The folder/full path to save an image when inspection is complete

Member.Name: strSavePath2
Member.Description: The folder/full path to save a second image when inspection is complete

Member.Name: strSaveLastPath
Member.Description: The folder/full path to save the image into when SaveLast is requested

Member.Name: bSave1InFolders
Member.Description: Whether the images in save path 1 are saved in folders per inspection number or not

Member.Name: bSave2InFolders
Member.Description: Whether the images in save path 2 are saved in folders per inspection number or not

Member.Name: bSaveLastInFolders
Member.Description: Whether the images in save last are saved in folders per inspection number or not

Member.Name: bSave1WithTools
Member.Description: BUGGY IF ENABLED! - Whether to save images in save path 1 with tools or not

Member.Name: bSave2WithTools
Member.Description: BUGGY IF ENABLED! - Whether to save images in save path 2 with tools or not

Member.Name: bSaveLastWithTools
Member.Description: BUGGY IF ENABLED! - Whether to save last images with tools or not

Member.Name: iMaxSave1Images
Member.Description: Maximum images to save in a single folder for save path 1 (0=infinite)

Member.Name: iMaxSave2Images
Member.Description: Maximum images to save in a single folder for save path 2 (0=infinite)

Member.Name: iMaxSaveLastImages
Member.Description: Maximum images to save in a single folder for save last path (0=infinite)
